proc.title: Preparation Procedure (7 Steps)
proc.step1: Fill tank with clean water to 60–70% of target volume
proc.step2: Add Tank B fertilizers sequentially (KNO₃, KH₂PO₄, MgSO₄, micronutrients)
proc.step3: Mix for 5 minutes until fully dissolved
proc.step4: Add Tank A fertilizers sequentially (Ca, Fe chelate, NH₄NO₃)
proc.step6: Pre-dilute Tank C acid (HNO₃) in a separate container, then add slowly ⚠ Never add concentrate directly
proc.step7: Measure EC and pH, verify against target values. Check 1:100 dilution ratio
